task: Evaluate the population-level impact and individual-level effectiveness of human papillomavirus (HPV) vaccination on the prevalence of vaccine-targeted HPV genotypes among sexually experienced U.S. females and males aged 14-24 years using NHANES data from 2003 to 2018. The analysis should: (1) estimate survey-weighted prevalence of quadrivalent HPV vaccine (4vHPV)-targeted types (HPV 6, 11, 16, 18) and non-vaccine types among sexually experienced females in four eras: prevaccine (2003-2006), and three vaccine eras (2007-2010, 2011-2014, 2015-2018); (2) calculate vaccine impact as the percent reduction in 4vHPV-type prevalence from the prevaccine era to each vaccine era, overall and stratified by vaccination status (vaccinated vs. unvaccinated); (3) estimate vaccine effectiveness as 1 minus the prevalence ratio (vaccinated/unvaccinated) within each vaccine era; (4) assess indirect protection (herd immunity) by quantifying HPV prevalence reductions among unvaccinated females; (5) extend the analysis to sexually experienced males aged 14-24 using NHANES 2013-2018 data (male genital HPV testing began in 2013-2014); (6) monitor for potential type replacement by tracking non-4vHPV-type prevalence trends. HPV DNA detection is based on participant-collected cervicovaginal swabs (females) and penile swabs (males) tested by PCR-based genotyping. Self-reported HPV vaccination history (>= 1 dose) is obtained from the immunization questionnaire. All analyses must account for the complex survey design of NHANES (sample weights, PSU, strata).

data.name: NHANES 2003-2018 Demographics (8 cycles)
data.description: Demographic variables including age, sex, race/ethnicity, education, and family income. Used for population characterization and vaccination coverage denominators.

data.name: NHANES 2003-2018 HPV DNA Genotyping (Females)
data.description: HPV DNA results from self-collected cervicovaginal swabs tested by Roche Linear Array HPV Genotyping Test. Covers 37 HPV types including vaccine types (6, 11, 16, 18) and high-risk non-vaccine types.

data.name: NHANES 2013-2018 HPV DNA Genotyping (Males)
data.description: HPV DNA results from self-collected penile swabs. Male genital HPV testing was incorporated into NHANES starting in 2013-2014.

data.name: NHANES 2003-2018 Sexual Behavior Questionnaire
data.description: Self-reported sexual experience, age at first intercourse, and number of lifetime sexual partners. Used to define the 'sexually experienced' study population.

data.name: NHANES 2007-2018 Immunization Questionnaire
data.description: Self-reported HPV vaccination history including receipt of >= 1 dose. HPV vaccination questions added to NHANES starting in 2007-2008 cycle.

data.name: Variable Codebook
data.description: Complete variable definitions, value labels, and survey design notes for all NHANES components used in this analysis.
